title: matricaria glabra
intro: Matricaria glabra, also known as smooth chamomile, is a perennial herb in the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects, making it a natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Matricaria glabra include soothing digestive problems, calming anxiety and insomnia, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and skin irritations. Matricaria glabra can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or topical cream, and its essential oil is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
